chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-178 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 1648/22 3.For hearing of main case 30-04-2025 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** On 03.04.2025, the following order was passed: “None present for the petitioners nor any intimation received. This petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution, however, in the interest of justice adjourned to 30.04.2025. Let intimation notice be issued to Counsel for the petitioners for the next date of hearing”. Today, neither petitioners are present nor their counsel is in attendance; no intimation is received, which shows that the petitioners and their counsel have lost their interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
